title: Shield Breaches in AX Combat
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM ShieldState WHERE ShieldsUp = 0 AND event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate

details.text: {total} shield failure event(s) recorded during the report period. Thargoids punch through human shields faster than almost any other adversary in the galaxy — a high breach count alongside few deaths shows genuine AX resilience; alongside many deaths, it honestly reflects the learning curve every AX pilot goes through.
details.help: ShieldState ShieldsUp = 0 fires when shields collapse. total drives the title as the total shield breach count.

tagLines: Shield failure events compiled. Shield-down incidents noted in the anti-xeno combat record.
No shields in Thargoid space means cauterised hull. You lost your shields. You survived. Usually.
The shield down alarm in a Thargoid fight sounds different than it does anywhere else. You know it well.
